Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class PromptVersion

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.PromptVersion
public class PromptVersion extends SObject

Java class for PromptVersion complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="PromptVersion">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActionButtonLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActionButtonLink" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Body" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DelayDays" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DismissButtonLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DisplayPosition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DisplayType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ElementRelativePosition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Header" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Image" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ContentAsset" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ImageAltText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ImageId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ImageLink" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ImageLocation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IndexWithIsPublished" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IndexWithoutIsPublished" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPublished" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Parent" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Prompt" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PublishedByUser" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PublishedByUserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PublishedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReferenceElementContext" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldDisplayActionButton" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldIgnoreGlobalDelay" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StepNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetAppDeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetAppNamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetPageKey1" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetPageKey1Ref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetPageKey2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetPageKey3" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetPageKey4" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetPageType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetRecordType" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}RecordType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetRecordTypeId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ThemeColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ThemeSaturation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimesToDisplay" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserProfileAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="VersionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="VideoLink" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
